name: Ripe Banana Loaf:)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, sift together the flour, mixed spice, and salt.
2. Add small pieces of butter to the dry ingredients and mix until combined.
3. Peel the bananas and mash them with a fork.
4. Gradually add the mashed bananas, along with the remaining ingredients (sugar, honey, sultanas, glace cherries, almonds or walnuts, eggs, and lemon juice), stirring until thoroughly mixed.
5. Pour the mixture into a 22cm [9"] loaf tin.
6. Bake at 180°C for one hour, then reduce the temperature to 160°C and bake for another half hour.
7. Remove from the tin and cool on a rack.
8. Serve thinly sliced and buttered. This tea loaf tastes even better when kept overnight.
